message.content:
Search the collabspace-server codebase at D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server for:
1. How the management/admin user system works - look for classes related to "management", "ManagementSpace", "MANAGE_MEMBER", "registerUsers", "admin"
2. Any default admin account configuration or initialization
3. How user IDs map to actual user accounts (email/nickname)
4. Look at EnterpriseEnvironmentInitializers or similar config classes

Focus on finding what account/email has the admin or management permissions to add users. Report back any relevant class names, configurations, and account details you find.
